Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3309-09-14
Aegis Releases Upgraded Xeno Scanner
Aegis releases the upgraded pulse wave xeno scanner that detects human life signs on Thargoid Titans, with Tanner warning pilots about the dangers of close approach.
3309-05-25
Materials Needed for Titan Research Project
Aegis requests materials to mass-produce the pulse wave xeno scanner for analyzing Thargoid Titans, modifying Professor Palin's original design.
